Class ResolvedCommandAction

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.ResolvedCommandAction
public final class ResolvedCommandAction extends Object
Public immutable view of an executable command action.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ResolvedCommandAction(String name, List<String> path, String description, List<String> aliases, String permission, MagicPermissionDefault permissionDefault, CommandThreading threading, List<CommandArgument> arguments)
    Creates a new resolved command action.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    aliases()
    Returns the aliases for this action.
    List<CommandArgument>
    arguments()
    Returns the list of arguments for this action.

    description()
    Returns the description of the action.
    String
    fullPath()
    Returns the full space-separated command path.
    List<String>

    Returns the full path segments including the action name.
    String
    name()
    Returns the name of the action.
    List<String>
    path()
    Returns the command path segments leading to this action.
    String
    permission()
    Returns the required permission node.
    MagicPermissionDefault
    permissionDefault()
    Returns the default permission state.
    CommandThreading
    threading()
    Returns the execution threading mode.

  • Constructor Details

    • ResolvedCommandAction

      public ResolvedCommandAction(String name, List<String> path, String description, List<String> aliases, String permission, MagicPermissionDefault permissionDefault, CommandThreading threading, List<CommandArgument> arguments)
      Creates a new resolved command action.
      Parameters:
      name - action name
      path - command path segments
      description - action description
      aliases - action aliases
      permission - required permission
      permissionDefault - default permission state
      threading - execution threading mode
      arguments - list of command arguments

  • Method Details

      Returns the name of the action.

      Returns the command path segments leading to this action.

      Returns the default permission state.

    • threading

      Returns the execution threading mode.
